user.title: SamsungTV Encrypted
user.description: Turn on the TV, then enter its network details. The next step asks for the PIN shown on the TV.

pin.title: Enter TV PIN
pin.description: Enter the PIN displayed on the TV.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the TV.
error.pairing_failed: The TV did not complete pairing.
error.mac_not_found: No MAC address was found in the ARP cache. Turn on the TV and try again, or enter the MAC address manually.

init.title: SamsungTV Encrypted
init.description: Set the TV MAC address for Wake-on-LAN. Leave it empty to try detecting it from the ARP cache while the TV is on.

error.mac_not_found: No MAC address was found in the ARP cache. Turn on the TV and try again, or enter the MAC address manually.
